coverage_window.description: Public market-driver information from yesterday to now.

executive_summary.one_sentence_summary: US equities shifted from Thursday's lower-oil/lower-yield broadening rally to Friday's tech-led selloff as a strong May payrolls report repriced Fed expectations higher, lifted yields and the dollar, pressured gold, and raised volatility risk.

top_drivers.driver: May payrolls upside surprise and upward revisions
top_drivers.fact_summary: BLS reported +172k May payrolls, 4.3% unemployment, +0.3% m/m average hourly earnings, and +93k combined upward revisions to March/April.
top_drivers.interpretation: The report challenged Fed-easing expectations and made front-end rate repricing the central transmission channel.
top_drivers.confidence_notes: BLS and AP/Reuters sources directly support the fact pattern.

sources.title: The Employment Situation - May 2026
Stocks slump as Big Tech sinks and a strong May jobs report boosts odds for higher interest rates
Instant View: Strong May jobs number sends yields, rate expectations higher

top_drivers.driver: Higher Treasury yields and Fed-hike odds
top_drivers.fact_summary: AP/Reuters cited 2-year yields around 4.15%-4.16% and 10-year yields around 4.54% after payrolls; Reuters cited December tightening odds near 65% vs 48% before the report.
top_drivers.interpretation: Rate-sensitive tech/growth valuations and non-yielding gold were the clearest cross-asset pressure points.
top_drivers.confidence_notes: Multiple public sources aligned on direction and approximate levels.

sources.title: Stocks slump as Big Tech sinks and a strong May jobs report boosts odds for higher interest rates
Instant View: Strong May jobs number sends yields, rate expectations higher
Gold falls over 2% as robust US jobs data cements bets on higher rates

top_drivers.fact_summary: AP reported Nasdaq underperformed the S&P 500 Friday and cited sharp losses in Nvidia and Broadcom at midday.
top_drivers.interpretation: The index decline was amplified by megacap/semiconductor weight rather than clearly uniform broad-market liquidation.
top_drivers.confidence_notes: Intraday breadth can change before close.

sources.title: Stocks slump as Big Tech sinks and a strong May jobs report boosts odds for higher interest rates

top_drivers.fact_summary: AP reported Brent fell Thursday and Friday but remained far above pre-war levels noted in the article.
top_drivers.interpretation: Oil weakness helped Thursday but did not offset Friday's labor/rate shock; Middle East headlines remain weekend gap risk.
top_drivers.confidence_notes: Oil price direction is sourced; geopolitical path is uncertain.

what_changed_from_previous_session.why_it_matters: Fed-policy repricing became the main driver.

facts: AP reported Brent lower Thursday and Friday; Reuters reported spot gold down 2.4% Friday after jobs data.
interpretations: Oil relief was outweighed by rates for equities; gold was pressured by higher opportunity cost and dollar strength.

headline_vs_actual_driver.headline_narrative: Stocks fell because jobs were strong.
headline_vs_actual_driver.actual_or_more_likely_driver: The strong jobs report mattered because it repriced Fed expectations, lifted yields, and pressured rate-sensitive tech leadership.
headline_vs_actual_driver.interpretation: Rates were the central transmission channel.

headline_vs_actual_driver.headline_narrative: Lower oil should be bullish for equities.
headline_vs_actual_driver.actual_or_more_likely_driver: Lower oil helped Thursday, but Friday's payroll/rates shock dominated while geopolitical energy risk remained active.
evidence: Brent lower both days; equities rallied Thursday and fell Friday after payrolls.
headline_vs_actual_driver.interpretation: Oil was an offset, not the dominant driver.

vix_portfolio_strategy_relevance.summary: Public context points to higher VIX/market-structure monitoring needs after payrolls repriced yields higher from a low-volatility, record/high-index backdrop.
possible_implications_without_recommenda: Monitor whether SPX/Nasdaq weakness broadens beyond megacap tech.
Monitor VIX term structure and spot VIX persistence.
Monitor 2-year Treasury/Fed-hike odds as the core transmission channel.
Monitor oil and Middle East headlines for weekend gap risk.
